para_trans: regarding the assignment of additional charge of this post.
GOVERNMENT ORDER NUMBER: SUNKE-2026 / Q.No.21 / Q. 1418
Madame Cama Marg, Martyrdom Rajguru Chowk, Mantralaya, Mumbai 400 032
Reference: - Planning Department, Government Decision No. Circular - 2026 / Q. No. 21 / Ka. 1418, dated 10.4.2026.
Dynamics in governance using geospatial technology
The government has taken a decision in this regard. Maharashtra Geospatial Technology under 10.4.2026
Application Centre (Mahajiotec) has been set up. Maharashtra Geospatial
Additional post of Managing Director, Technology Application Centre (Mahajiotec)
Further orders to Dr. Ravikiran Govekar, Additional Principal Chief Conservator of Forests (Candle Forest Cell), Mumbai
It is being handed over. He held the post of Additional Principal Chief Conservator of Forests (Candle Forest Cell), Mumbai.
Taking over his regular charge as Managing Director, Mahajiotek
This Government Order is available on the website of the Government of Maharashtra www.maharashtra.gov.in.
